title: EVA FIX Abnormals in Dairy Life
display_title: EVA FIX Abnormals in Dairy Life
wikitext:
[]: EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri May 09, 2008 2:47 pm Download here. It's an unofficial work that displays many unofficial Evangelion designs that I find quite nice (some are better than the new ones for Rebuild , in my opinion, though I like those too). I really like the outlandishness of the Distraction Type and Reactor Type Evas. I meant to upload this quite some time ago at the request of some people in the ANIMA thread, but I just got around to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri May 09, 2008 4:39 pm Awesome stuff! (Doujinshi or not.) Thanks! Although that Post-3I-ish pic of them all naked and being tested so disturbing no matter how many times I see it. (Asuka actually crying for one thing is bad... And Italy, May 30th 2016, eh? Ugh...) And... THE 10TH CHILDREN?! o_O Whoa. That's uh interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Sat May 10, 2008 9:50 am The Compressed Folder is invalid. Are you sure its a ZIP file?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sat May 10, 2008 10:08 am universalperson wrote: The Compressed Folder is invalid. Are you sure its a ZIP file?

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sat May 10, 2008 12:15 pm Somewhat freaky - but intriguing, nevertheless.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Sat May 10, 2008 8:06 pm Okay, got it working, wish I could understand what they said...and whether there was an actual dojin to go with this. Is Eva-13 from the Eva video game?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat May 10, 2008 8:12 pm universalperson wrote: Okay, got it working, wish I could understand what they said...and whether there was an actual dojin to go with this. Is Eva-13 from the Eva video game?

[]:             Quote Post by GVman » Sun Sep 07, 2008 9:04 pm I loved how Toji had a cane.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Sep 07, 2008 9:11 pm Eva-09 is kick-ass. Assault type FTW!

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Sep 07, 2008 9:20 pm And how am I suppose to drive those things....I mean rly.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sun Sep 07, 2008 9:23 pm Can't beat EVA-11 Cannon Type!! I knew that off the top of my head!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Sep 07, 2008 9:31 pm Hmmm, Abnormals in Dairy Life, is that like a cow with 8 teets on her utters?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Sep 08, 2008 6:48 am There's at least one other EVA FIX book by Chocolate Shop (what an awful thing to name your circle...), "The Third (Evangelion)". (Can put up a RAR later.) Their site seems to be down, but bringing it up via Internet Archive (which I've never tried) might provide more titles. Action_Bastard wrote: Hmmm, Abnormals in Dairy Life, is that like a cow with 8 teets on her utters?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 08, 2008 2:47 pm Reichu wrote: but I might be unique in that.

[]:             Quote Post by Chowwow » Mon Sep 08, 2008 11:54 pm This is some very interesting artwork - it looks very professional. The detail in the Evas are astounding and the characters are well designed too. Where exactly did this come from?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Sep 09, 2008 1:07 am I think Toji could use some Auto-Mail.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Sep 09, 2008 4:40 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: And Italy, May 30th 2016, eh? Ugh...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 09, 2008 5:43 pm When I posted that, it was just a comment how it really was after 3I since that apparently happened on 01/01/16. The picture itself is downright wrong though.

[]:             Quote Post by GVman » Tue Sep 09, 2008 8:27 pm Action_Bastard wrote: I think Toji could use some Auto-Mail.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Sep 09, 2008 8:54 pm GVman wrote: Action_Bastard wrote: I think Toji could use some Auto-Mail.

[]: EVA FIX - Abnormals in Dairy Life             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri May 09, 2008 2:47 pm Download here. It's an unofficial work that displays many unofficial Evangelion designs that I find quite nice (some are better than the new ones for Rebuild , in my opinion, though I like those too). I really like the outlandishness of the Distraction Type and Reactor Type Evas. I meant to upload this quite some time ago at the request of some people in the ANIMA thread, but I just got around to it.
